channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Amazon says AWS Bahrain region ‘disrupted’ following drone activity
item.description: The disruption marks the second time in a month that AWS operations have been affected by the Iran war.

item.title: Iran launches waves of missiles towards Israel
item.description: Israel’s Magen David Adom emergency medical service said 'six people were lightly injured' in the missile strikes.

item.title: Iran says no talks with US, calls Trump statements a ‘bluff’
item.description: Iranian officials have dismissed statements by Trump as a ‘bluff’, denying any direct or indirect talks with the US.

item.title: Drone footage shows aftermath of Iranian missile attack in Tel Aviv
item.description: Drone footage shows extensive damage to a multi-storey residential building in Tel Aviv after a wave of Iranian attacks.

item.title: Deadly air attack hits pro-Iran Popular Mobilisation Forces in Iraq
item.description: Video shows the aftermath of an airstrike in Iraq’s Anbar province on a headquarters of the Popular Mobilisation Forces.

item.title: Al Jazeera reports from scene of attack on Tehran residential area
item.description: Al Jazeera reports from scene of attack on Tehran residential area

item.title: Despite Trump’s peace talk claims, US-Israeli attacks continue to hit Iran
item.description: Huge explosions were heard in Tehran and other cities, as Iran denied it held talks with the US to end the war.

item.title: Top EU official calls for negotiations with Iran and an end to war
item.description: European Commission President Ursula Von der Leyen has called for negotiations with Iran and an end to hostilities.

item.title: Where do reported US-Iran ‘negotiations’ leave Israel?
item.description: Israeli analysts describe confusion as US President Trump unexpectedly shifts from threatened strikes on Iran to talks.

item.title: Mbappe fit and ready to play every Real Madrid game before World Cup
item.description: French striker says he has made '100 percent recovery' from his lingering knee injury and is fully available.
